user_task_description: This resume opens with a blank page and lacks a concise professional profile.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Delete the blank first page, then insert exactly two profile lines under the candidate name: the first must start `Commissioning:` and the second must start `Vendor coordination:`.
atomic_scope: Only the blank-page deletion and the two-line profile generation are explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx resume with no blank opening page and a two-line profile under the name.

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- Keep the rest of the resume content intact
- Do not add a third profile line
